content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_CONTACT_CENTER_PERFORMANCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_CONTACT_CENTER_PERFORMANCE]
( 
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Agent_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AppointmentCount] [int]  NULL,
	[EarliestAppointmentDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EarliestDateAppointmentSet] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EarliestVerifiedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EarliestConfirmedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ApptSetCount] [int]  NULL,
	[VerifiedCount] [int]  NULL,
	[ConfirmedCount] [int]  NULL,
	[IssuedCount] [int]  NULL,
	[NetIssuedCount] [int]  NULL,
	[SatCount] [int]  NULL,
	[SoldCount] [int]  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [EarliestAppointmentDate] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
